name: shortpy-ide
description: Drive Apple's Shortcuts runtime Python compiler and edit-mode plist-to-Python converter from VS Code.

commands.title: Shortcuts IDE: Export Python To Shortcut
Shortcuts IDE: Validate With Apple Runtime
Shortcuts IDE: Open Workflow Plist From Python
Shortcuts IDE: Python To Plist Debug JSON
Shortcuts IDE: Import Plist As Python
Shortcuts IDE: Refresh Native ToolRenderer Interface
Shortcuts IDE: Point Simulator ToolKit To Host

shortcutsRuntimeIDE.bridgeCtlPath.description: Path to bridgectl.py. Leave empty to use bridge/tools/bridgectl.py from the Shortpy IDE repository.

shortcutsRuntimeIDE.toolkitCtlPath.description: Path to simulator toolkitctl.py. Leave empty to use bridge/tools/toolkitctl.py from the Shortpy IDE repository.

shortcutsRuntimeIDE.simulatorDevice.description: Simulator UDID for ToolKit commands, or booted.

shortcutsRuntimeIDE.toolkitMetadataPath.description: Optional path to cached ToolKit metadata JSON. Leave empty to use extension storage.

shortcutsRuntimeIDE.toolRendererMetadata.description: Optional path to cached native ToolRenderer interface metadata JSON. Leave empty to use extension storage.

shortcutsRuntimeIDE.refreshToolKitMetada.description: Refresh simulator ToolKit Python-name metadata when the extension activates.

shortcutsRuntimeIDE.refreshToolRendererI.description: Load cached Apple's native ToolRenderer Python interface metadata when the extension activates. Use the explicit native ToolRenderer refresh command for a live render.

shortcutsRuntimeIDE.highlightKnownComman.description: Highlight known Shortcuts action and trigger Python names from ToolKit metadata.

shortcutsRuntimeIDE.writeToDebugConsole.description: Mirror key bridge and ToolKit events into the VS Code Debug Console when available.

shortcutsRuntimeIDE.pythonPath.description: Python executable used to run bridgectl.py.

shortcutsRuntimeIDE.socket.description: Shortcuts IDE bridge socket path, or auto for bridgectl.py discovery.

shortcutsRuntimeIDE.defaultShortcutExten.description: Extension used when saving a shortcut from Python.

shortcutsRuntimeIDE.signShortcutExports.description: Sign .shortcut exports with macOS shortcuts sign --mode anyone. .plist exports always remain raw workflow plist bytes.

shortcutsRuntimeIDE.shortcutSigningMode.description: Signing mode passed to macOS shortcuts sign for .shortcut exports.

shortcutsRuntimeIDE.shortcutsCliPath.description: Path to the macOS shortcuts CLI used for signing. Leave empty to use /usr/bin/shortcuts.

shortcutsRuntimeIDE.autoConvertPlistOnOp.description: Legacy behavior: automatically open a separate Python document when a .shortcut or workflow .plist is opened. The custom editor is the primary UI.

shortcutsRuntimeIDE.validateOnSave.description: Validate Python files with the Shortcuts runtime bridge on save and surface compiler errors in Problems.

shortcutsRuntimeIDE.validateOnType.description: Validate Python with the Shortcuts runtime bridge while editing. This calls into the live Shortcuts process after a debounce.

shortcutsRuntimeIDE.offerOpenInShortcuts.description: Offer to open the saved .shortcut/.plist file after export.

shortcutsRuntimeIDE.overwriteSiblingShor.description: Allow Write Sibling Shortcut to overwrite an existing sibling shortcut without prompting.
